headline: Coherent NVIDIA Pact Links AI Optics Growth With Stretched Valuation Metrics
summary: Coherent (NYSE:COHR) announced a multi year partnership with NVIDIA that includes a planned US$2b investment. The agreement focuses on expanding optical component supply, research and development, and U.S. manufacturing capacity. The partnership is tied to growing AI driven demand for datacenter and communications products. Coherent operates in optical and laser technologies that are used in high speed communications, AI compute, and advanced manufacturing. The new agreement with NVIDIA...
